rationale: Elec. Code §271.012 governs certificates of election for political subdivision offices. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The presiding officer of the canvassing authority that regularly serves a particular political subdivision shall issue certificates of election to candidates elected at the joint election to offices of the political subdivision.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict exists.
